content.problemStatement:
Write a program to accept as input the length and all the elements of an array

You need to output the difference between the sum of all the even index elements and the sum of the odd index elements.
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. For each test case, the first line contains an integer N, the length of the array. The second line contains N space‑separated integers representing the array elements.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output a single integer on its own line – the difference between the sum of elements at even indices (0‑based) and the sum of elements at odd indices.

solution.approach: For each test case iterate through the array once. Keep two running totals: one for even indices and one for odd indices. After processing all elements, compute result = evenSum - oddSum and output it. This uses O(N) time and O(1) extra space per test case.
solution.timeComplexity: O(N) per test case, where N is the length of the array. Overall O(T * N).
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) additional space besides the input array.
